description: The originating demand record: a requester's validated request to buy materials, spares, services, or product-design items. The spine of the whole cycle; its identifier travels end to end and is never re-keyed.
lifecycleEnum: RequisitionStatus + RequisitionStage (two independent dimensions) + per-stage CompletionStatus

fields.name: identifier
fields.label: Requisition No.
fields.validation: configurable pattern {YYYY}{MM_SHORT}{DEPT_PREFIX}07{RUNNING5}; unique; immutable for the whole cycle including delays
fields.purpose: Stable human-readable key that links requisition -> approval -> RFQ -> PO -> GRN -> invoice -> payment so every downstream record traces back to one demand. Immutability (axiom A1) is what makes the audit trail and traceability credible.

fields.name: date
fields.label: Date of Request
fields.purpose: Anchors the requisition-to-PO cycle-time KPI and the need-date SLA; the start of the procurement clock.

fields.name: requesterId
fields.label: Requester
fields.purpose: Pins ownership and the Req-Department approval stage to the originator (axiom: requester stage pinned); scopes visibility to own/department records.

fields.name: departmentId
fields.label: Department
fields.purpose: Drives routing-rule selection (chain resolved by department/category/value) and department-level spend analytics.

fields.name: category
fields.label: Category
fields.purpose: Selects the dynamic field config (which fields are mandatory) and the receipt routing (materials->QC->GRN vs spares->Engineering vs services->milestone). The single biggest branch driver downstream.

fields.name: directOrIndirect
fields.label: Direct / Indirect
fields.purpose: Distinguishes production materials (direct, SCOR S2) from MRO/office/services (indirect, SCOR S3) on one spine; feeds spend-cut reporting and the match path.

fields.name: purchaseType
fields.label: Purchase Type
fields.purpose: Local vs Import drives the field config (import adds customs/HS/incoterm fields), the inbound-logistics tracking layer, and customs documents at receipt.

fields.name: priority
fields.label: Priority
fields.purpose: Urgency weight (ASAP=4/SameDay=2/Within2Days=1/Within1Week=0) feeds least-loaded approver assignment and the OTIF time-remaining calculation; expresses business urgency without a free-text 'urgent' flag.

fields.name: currency
fields.label: Currency
fields.purpose: The transaction currency; the base-currency total is derived from it via the FX service so thresholds/comparison/analytics are normalized (axiom A12).

fields.name: projectOrCostCenterId
fields.label: Project / Cost Center
fields.validation: ACTIVE projects/cost-centers only; INACTIVE not selectable
fields.purpose: The budget the spend is charged to; drives the soft budget check at intake and the hard commitment at PO (axiom A4), and cost-center spend analytics.

fields.name: justification
fields.label: Justification / Notes
fields.purpose: Business reason shown to all approvers; the audit/justification record an auditor reads later to understand why the spend was approved.

fields.name: stage
fields.label: Stage
fields.validation: linear, one step forward only; advance gated by mandatory fields (axiom A2)
fields.purpose: The lifecycle position (INITIATION->ORDERED->PARTIAL_DELIVERY->POST_DELIVERY); gates what fields are required and is one of the three dimensions whose agreement defines COMPLETED (axiom A3).

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.validation: COMPLETED only when POST_DELIVERY + all stages APPROVED + matches cleared + no NCR/CAPA block (A3)
fields.purpose: The single status dimension (IN_PROGRESS/ON_HOLD/CANCELLED/COMPLETED); the COMPLETED guard is the one place all three dimensions must agree.

fields.name: totalAmount
fields.label: Total Amount
fields.validation: sum over lines of quantity x unitPrice
fields.purpose: The requisition value in transaction currency; recomputed on any line edit (postValueSync).

fields.name: totalAmountInBase
fields.label: Total (Base Currency)
fields.validation: FX-converted; graceful degradation to original on FX failure
fields.purpose: The normalized amount that drives the budget check, approval thresholds, auto-approval, and analytics (axiom A12). The single comparable money figure across currencies.

fields.name: budgetOverride
fields.label: Budget Override
fields.mandatoryCondition: set only when over budget and an override was approved
fields.purpose: A logged exception when a requisition exceeds available budget; a mandatory-reason record, never a silent bypass (axiom A4). What an auditor inspects for budget-control integrity.

fields.name: remarks
fields.label: Activity Log
fields.purpose: The immutable, timestamped activity trail (send-back notes, comments) every role can append; the human-readable audit narrative.

invariants: A2 stage one step + mandatory gate
A13 audit + SSE on every change
